creator: khensel@sis125.berkeley.edu
text:
I have resolved some of the library problems, however I'm still haveing
trouble with libstdc++.so.3.

The packages I have installed are from the ftp site for freebsd and are:

These are the listings of the tgz files before the pkg_add's were done.

The message received refers to libstdc++.so.3 and says "Undefined symbol
__ti9exception".

Other information:

su-2.03# ls -al libstdc++*
-r--r--r--  1 root  wheel  515564 Mar 20  2000 libstdc++.a
-r--r--r--  1 root  wheel  251888 Mar 20  2000 libstdc++.so.3
su-2.03# pwd
/usr/lib

Any further information you can give as to the correct package I need etc is
greatly appreciated.

Some of the apps (like kmail and konqueror run under Afterstep).

Thanks, Ken
